response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including C++ in a prior role at National Instruments, but his recent work has focused heavily on web and mobile technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, React, Dlang) rather than C++ or industrial automation. His lack of recent C++ experience, limited exposure to cloud platforms like Azure, and no mention of IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity standards raise concerns about his direct fit for the role. However, his strong software engineering background and adaptability could be valuable if upskilled.
strengths: Strong C++ experience from National Instruments role with low-latency and hardware integration
Proven track record in scalable systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby, high-throughput at Sociomantic)
Diverse technical stack and adaptability across languages/paradigms (C++, Dlang, Node.js, TypeScript)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last role in 2015; no mention of C++ in recent projects)
No direct experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards
Lacks exposure to cloud platforms (e.g., Azure) and secure development lifecycle practices for industrial systems
